subject: Sports
title: Wilt Chamberlain: The 100-Point Game
description: One-minute skill: Wilt Chamberlain: The 100-Point Game.

hook.text: On March 2, 1962, one man scored 100 points in a single NBA game. That record still stands.

buildup.text: Wilt Chamberlain averaged 50.4 points per game that season—a number so absurd it seems fictional.

discovery.text: Against the Knicks, he scored 59 by halftime. His teammates kept feeding him the ball all night.

twist.text: No television footage exists of the game. Only a single photograph of Wilt holding a piece of paper reading '100.'

climax.text: Despite his records, Chamberlain won only two championships. Russell's Celtics kept beating him.

punchline.text: One hundred points. One game. One man. Forever unmatched.

quiz.question: How many points did Wilt Chamberlain average per game in 1961-62?
